title: Runtime CDN visual stress report - Mermaid, code, grouped navigation, and long multilingual content
summary: Stress the report generator with rich content, long labels, many sections, wide code, nested JSON, and grouped navigation that must remain readable inside Codex.

sections.title: Executive status cards with long labels
sections.summary: Top-level scan cards for report quality signals.

cards.label: Primary risk
cards.value: Rich content can degrade if runtime libraries fail to load

sections.title: 中文长标题和英文长标题混排的 Markdown 内容区
sections.summary: Markdown tables, lists, unsafe content, and long prose should render safely.
sections.content: ## 关键结论 - 报告默认使用 `runtime-cdn`，但必须保留源码 fallback。 - 目录按组展示，而不是把二十多个 section 堆在一行。 - Mermaid、Markdown、代码高亮都要有独立状态。 | Area | Expected behavior | Stress signal | | --- | --- | --- | | Navigation | grouped and readable | long headings | | Mermaid | contained SVG or explicit degraded state | long labels | | Code | highlighted tokens and internal scroll | 160-column line | [unsafe link](javascript:alert(1))

sections.title: Overview notes for dense engineering readers
sections.summary: Short notes should stay dense without huge line spacing.
sections.content:
### Reading contract

The report should feel like an engineering artifact, not a marketing page. Dense sections need clear hierarchy, restrained cards, high contrast, and predictable navigation.

sections.title: Runtime rendering timeline
sections.summary: A compact timeline checks section spacing and labels.

items.label: Load
items.detail: HTML opens with conclusion, navigation, and source fallbacks readable.

items.label: Enhance
items.detail: Marked, DOMPurify, Mermaid, and highlight.js load from pinned CDN URLs.

items.label: Verify
items.detail: Browser validation checks rendering state, overflow, overlap, and interactions.

sections.title: Flowchart with very long labels that previously escaped the diagram panel
sections.summary: Flowchart labels must stay contained or scroll inside the diagram panel.
sections.content:
flowchart LR
  A["OpenSpec change: polish-html-work-reports-runtime-quality with a deliberately long node label"] --> B["Generator emits runtime-cdn HTML with grouped navigation and dependency manifest"]
  B --> C["Runtime renders Mermaid Markdown and highlighted code inside isolated section containers"]
  C --> D["Validator checks Codex-visible browser layout across narrow medium and desktop viewports"]
  D --> E["Report remains readable with source fallbacks if any library degrades"]

sections.title: Sequence diagram for library loading and degraded fallback
sections.summary: Sequence diagrams test participant spacing and message labels.
sections.content:
sequenceDiagram
  participant Report as Generated HTML report
  participant CDN as Pinned CDN libraries
  participant Runtime as Rich render runtime
  participant Validator as Browser validator
  Report->>CDN: Load DOMPurify, Marked, Mermaid, highlight.js
  CDN-->>Runtime: Libraries available or failed
  Runtime->>Report: Set section state ready, degraded, or failed
  Validator->>Report: Inspect runtime state, layout, overflow, and interactions

sections.title: Class diagram for section state model
sections.summary: Class diagrams test labels, compartments, and SVG sizing.
sections.content:
classDiagram
  class ReportSection {
    +string id
    +string type
    +string group
    +string renderState
    +string sourceFallback
  }
  class RuntimeDependency {
    +string name
    +string version
    +string url
    +string state
  }
  class BrowserValidator {
    +checkOverflow()
    +checkOverlap()
    +checkMermaidBounds()
    +checkCodeTokens()
  }
  ReportSection --> RuntimeDependency : uses pinned runtime
  BrowserValidator --> ReportSection : verifies visual state

sections.title: Wide TypeScript code with long path and highlighted lines
sections.summary: Wide code must scroll inside the panel and keep line numbers aligned.

sections.title: Diff section with added and removed behavior
sections.content:
- if (input.renderMode && !["pre-rendered", "runtime"].includes(input.renderMode)) errors.push("renderMode must be pre-rendered or runtime.");
+ if (input.renderMode && !["runtime-cdn", "pre-rendered", "fallback-only", "runtime"].includes(input.renderMode)) errors.push("renderMode must be runtime-cdn, pre-rendered, fallback-only, or runtime alias.");

items.title: Flat navigation is hard to scan
items.body: Twenty section titles in one sticky bar make the first viewport feel crowded.

items.title: Runtime state is explicit
items.body: Each rich content section exposes ready, degraded, failed, or pending status.

items.title: Mermaid long labels need containment
items.body: Flowchart and class diagram labels should never cover adjacent sections.

items.title: Code color coverage improves
items.body: highlight.js token output replaces the low-coverage hand-written regex path.

sections.title: Rendered view and source audit tabs

tabs.label: Rendered
tabs.content: Runtime-cdn mode should render Markdown, Mermaid, and code after libraries load.

tabs.label: Source fallback
tabs.content: Every rich block keeps source text in a visible `<details>` block for audit.

tabs.label: Failure state
tabs.content: A failed block displays degraded or failed state instead of pretending success.

sections.title: Evidence note 1 - dependency manifest
sections.content:
- Runtime dependencies are pinned.
- The generated report exposes dependency purpose and state.

sections.title: Evidence note 2 - source fallback
sections.content:
- Source fallback blocks are mandatory for Markdown, Mermaid, code, and diff sections.
- Fallback text remains inert and escaped.

sections.title: Evidence note 3 - validation coverage
sections.content:
- Static checks confirm manifest and section structure.
- Browser checks confirm runtime states, overflow, overlap, and interaction behavior.

sections.title: Verification note - browser viewport 390
sections.content: The validator should check the 390px viewport for body overflow, nav readability, and code panel containment.

sections.title: Verification note - browser viewport 768
sections.content: The validator should check the 768px viewport for tablet layout and grouped navigation behavior.

sections.title: Verification note - browser viewport 1440
sections.content: The validator should check the 1440px viewport for desktop nav rail separation and rich panel containment.

sections.title: Implementation next actions
items: Generate this stress report through create-report.mjs.
Open the generated report in Codex and inspect Mermaid, code, and navigation.
Keep tasks.md synchronized as implementation groups complete.

evidence.label: Runtime libraries
evidence.value: DOMPurify, Marked, Mermaid, and highlight.js are pinned in generated HTML.

evidence.label: Codex view target
evidence.value: The report may use CDN runtime libraries because the target is Codex-visible static HTML.

nextActions: Use this fixture as the browser validation stress target.
Keep the generated stress report under reports/ for local inspection.
Update showcase output from fixture-backed generation.
